comment: Single source of truth for Gressio desktop recharge tiers. credits_per_dollar is the standard exchange rate (1 credit = $0.01 => 100). Each tier has a USD price and an optional bonus_pct granted on top of the standard rate. The server grants the bonus on Stripe top-ups and the desktop client renders these tiers verbatim. Edit + rebuild + redeploy the server to change. credits_per_dollar must match the backend QuotaPerUnit-derived rate.
